_comment: Managed by router-rs. Regenerate with `cargo run --manifest-path scripts/router-rs/Cargo.toml -- codex sync --repo-root "$PWD"`.

hooks.command: /usr/bin/env bash -lc 'CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT="${CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; ROUTER_RS_BIN=""; if [ -x "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/target/release/router-rs" ]; then ROUTER_RS_BIN="$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/target/release/router-rs"; elif [ -x "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/target/debug/router-rs" ]; then ROUTER_RS_BIN="$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/target/debug/router-rs"; elif [ -x "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/target/release/router-rs" ]; then ROUTER_RS_BIN="$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/target/release/router-rs"; elif [ -x "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/target/debug/router-rs" ]; then ROUTER_RS_BIN="$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/target/debug/router-rs"; else ROUTER_RS_BIN="$(command -v router-rs 2>/dev/null || true)"; fi; if [ ! -x "$ROUTER_RS_BIN" ]; then echo "[codex-hook] router-rs binary missing; state update skipped" >&2; exit 0; fi; "$ROUTER_RS_BIN" codex hook --event=PostToolUse --repo-root "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT"'

/usr/bin/env bash -lc 'CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT="${CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; ROUTER_RS_BIN=""; if [ -x "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/target/release/router-rs" ]; then ROUTER_RS_BIN="$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/target/release/router-rs"; elif [ -x "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/target/debug/router-rs" ]; then ROUTER_RS_BIN="$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/target/debug/router-rs"; elif [ -x "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/target/release/router-rs" ]; then ROUTER_RS_BIN="$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/target/release/router-rs"; elif [ -x "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/target/debug/router-rs" ]; then ROUTER_RS_BIN="$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/target/debug/router-rs"; else ROUTER_RS_BIN="$(command -v router-rs 2>/dev/null || true)"; fi; if [ ! -x "$ROUTER_RS_BIN" ]; then printf '%s\n' '{{"decision":"block","message":"router-rs binary unavailable for Codex hook","reason":"router-rs binary unavailable; fail-closed instead of silently bypassing critical hook enforcement"}}'; exit 1; fi; "$ROUTER_RS_BIN" codex hook --event=PreToolUse --repo-root "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT"'

/usr/bin/env bash -lc 'CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT="${CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; ROUTER_RS_BIN=""; if [ -x "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/target/release/router-rs" ]; then ROUTER_RS_BIN="$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/target/release/router-rs"; elif [ -x "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/target/debug/router-rs" ]; then ROUTER_RS_BIN="$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/router-rs/target/debug/router-rs"; elif [ -x "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/target/release/router-rs" ]; then ROUTER_RS_BIN="$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/target/release/router-rs"; elif [ -x "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/target/debug/router-rs" ]; then ROUTER_RS_BIN="$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT/target/debug/router-rs"; else ROUTER_RS_BIN="$(command -v router-rs 2>/dev/null || true)"; fi; if [ ! -x "$ROUTER_RS_BIN" ]; then echo "[codex-hook] router-rs binary missing; state update skipped" >&2; exit 0; fi; "$ROUTER_RS_BIN" codex hook --event=SessionStart --repo-root "$CODEX_PROJECT_ROOT"'
